codeSystems.name: AttachmentTagVS
codeSystems.title: Attachment Tag ValueSet
codeSystems.description:
Standard semantic tags used for categorization and workflow
qualification of attachments.

codeSystems.name: LabCategorySubcategory314eVS
codeSystems.title: 314e Lab Subcategories
codeSystems.description:
Procedure subcategories of Lab category used for more granular
operational classification.

codeSystems.name: ObservationTagVS
codeSystems.title: Observation Tag ValueSet
codeSystems.description:
Semantic tags used in meta.tag to qualify DiagnosticReport and
Observation resources participating in hierarchical parent-child
resource structures.

codeSystems.name: ProcedureCategoryBroad314eVS
codeSystems.title: 314e Broad Procedure Categories
codeSystems.description:
Top-level operational categories for procedures
and service requests.

codeSystems.name: ProcedureCategorySubcategory314eVS
codeSystems.title: 314e Procedure Subcategories
codeSystems.description:
Procedure subcategories used for more granular
operational classification.

codeSystems.name: TimeAccuracyUnitsVS314E
codeSystems.title: 314e Time Exactness Units ValueSet
codeSystems.description: Allowed exactness/ accurate precision units for dateTime, time, and instant precision indicators.

codeSystems.name: TimePrecisionUnitsVS314E
codeSystems.title: 314e Time Precision Units ValueSet
codeSystems.description: Allowed precision units for dateTime, time, and instant precision indicators.

codeSystems.name: AntimicrobialSusceptibilityTestingVS
codeSystems.title: Antimicrobial Susceptibility Testing
codeSystems.description:
Observation methods for antimicrobial susceptibility testing.
Includes HL7 v3 ObservationMethod code 0280 and all descendant codes.

codeSystems.name: MicroorganismByMethodVS
codeSystems.title: Microorganism by Method
codeSystems.description: LOINC methods used to identify microorganisms.
